case.title: NATIONAL SMALL SHPT. CONF. v. MIDDLEWEST MTR. F. B.

opinion.h4: NATIONAL SMALL SHPT. CONF. v. MIDDLEWEST MTR. F. B., (1969)

NATIONAL SMALL SHIPMENTS TRAFFIC CONFERENCE, INC., ET AL. v. MIDDLEWEST MOTOR FREIGHT BUREAU ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF MINNESOTA No. 539. Decided December 8, 1969
opinion.p: Arthur A. Arsham and John J. C. Martin for appellants.
Roland Rice for Middlewest Motor Freight Bureau et al., and Solicitor General Griswold and Fritz Kahn for the Interstate Commerce Commission, appellees.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.
opinion.h4: INTERNATIONAL NICKEL CO., v. CITY OF BAYONNE, (1969)
opinion.p: INTERNATIONAL NICKEL CO., INC. v. CITY OF BAYONNE APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY No. 542. Decided December 8, 1969
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
